subcodes.first_line: O Mahmud! We have enjoined upon all love, fellowship, affection and unity, and have abolished fanaticism [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمود انا امرنا الکل بالمحبه و الوداد و الموده و الاتحاد و رفعنا الحمیه
subcodes.subjects: @fanaticism and hatred, @goodly deeds; actions, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @unity; oneness of humanity
